prompt_preview:
You are a classical planning system. You are given a planning domain and a problem both in PDDL syntax.

STRICT REQUIREMENT: Your response must contain ONLY the executable plan — nothing else. No preamble, no explanation, no "We need to...", no natural-language commentary, no markdown unless it is a

message.content:
(register_crop_batch bench_batch_1)
(reserve_space_slot_for_batch bench_batch_1 space_slot_1)
(assign_variety_to_batch bench_batch_1 crop_variety_1)
(confirm_variety_for_batch bench_batch_1 crop_variety_1)
(rollback_variety_assignment_for_batch bench_batch_1 crop_variety_1)
(prepare_bench_with_consumable bench_batch_1 irrigation_profile_zone_1 consumable_fertilizer_1)
(register_crop_batch rack_batch_1)
(reserve_space_slot_for_batch rack_batch_1 space_slot_2)
(assign_variety_to_batch rack_batch_1 crop_variety_1)
(confirm_variety_for_batch rack_batch_1 crop_variety_1)
(reserve_equipment_for_batch rack_batch_1 equipment_1)
(engage_lighting_profile_for_rack rack_batch_1 lighting_profile_zone_1 crop_variety_1)
(prepare_rack_with_equipment rack_batch_1 lighting_profile_zone_1 equipment_1)
(rollback_variety_assignment_for_batch rack_batch_1 crop_variety_1)
(assign_variety_to_batch bench_batch_1 crop_variety_1)
(provision_production_bay_with_prepared_irrigation bench_batch_1 rack_batch_1 irrigation_profile_zone_1 lighting_profile_zone_1 production_bay_a)
(finalize_bench_preparation bench_batch_1 irrigation_profile_zone_1 crop_variety_1 consumable_fertilizer_1)
(mark_bay_ready_for_substrate_loading production_bay_a bench_batch_1 crop_variety_1)
(finalize_bench_allocation_to_bay bench_batch_1 production_bay_a)
(finalize_rack_allocation_to_bay rack_batch_1 production_bay_a)
(assign_contingency_to_batch bench_batch_1 contingency_reserve_1 crop_variety_1)
(finalize_bench_batch_and_return_slot bench_batch_1 space_slot_1 contingency_reserve_1)
(rollback_variety_assignment_for_batch bench_batch_1 crop_variety_1)
(assign_variety_to_batch rack_batch_1 crop_variety_1)
(assign_contingency_to_batch rack_batch_1 contingency_reserve_1 crop_variety_1)
(finalize_rack_batch_and_return_slot rack_batch_1 space_slot_2 contingency_reserve_1)
(release_equipment_from_batch rack_batch_1 equipment_1)
(register_crop_batch greenhouse_facility_a)
(reserve_space_slot_for_batch greenhouse_facility_a space_slot_1)
(assign_variety_to_batch greenhouse_facility_a crop_variety_1)
(confirm_variety_for_batch greenhouse_facility_a crop_variety_1)
(attach_permit_to_facility greenhouse_facility_a permit_a)
(load_substrate_into_bay greenhouse_facility_a substrate_mix_a production_bay_a)
(apply_permit_and_advance_compliance_stage greenhouse_facility_a substrate_mix_a production_bay_a crop_variety_1 permit_a)
(provision_nutrient_to_facility greenhouse_facility_a nutrient_solution_batch_1)
(reserve_equipment_for_batch greenhouse_facility_a equipment_1)
(assign_nutrient_and_confirm_facility greenhouse_facility_a nutrient_solution_batch_1 equipment_1 substrate_mix_a production_bay_a)
(provision_climate_buffer_to_facility greenhouse_facility_a climate_buffer_1)
(apply_climate_buffer_and_confirm_profiles greenhouse_facility_a climate_buffer_1 substrate_mix_a production_bay_a)
(assign_labor_shift_to_facility greenhouse_facility_a labor_shift_morning)
(perform_final_quality_validation_for_facility greenhouse_facility_a bench_batch_1 rack_batch_1 crop_variety_1 labor_shift_morning)
(finalize_validation_and_release greenhouse_facility_a)
(assign_contingency_to_batch greenhouse_facility_a contingency_reserve_1 crop_variety_1)
(finalize_facility_allocation_and_return_slot greenhouse_facility_a space_slot_1 contingency_reserve_1)
(rollback_variety_assignment_for_batch greenhouse_facility_a crop_variety_1)
(release_equipment_from_batch greenhouse_facility_a equipment_1)
(revoke_nutrient_from_facility greenhouse_facility_a nutrient_solution_batch_1)
(revoke_climate_buffer_from_facility greenhouse_facility_a climate_buffer_1)
(register_crop_batch greenhouse_facility_b)
(reserve_space_slot_for_batch greenhouse_facility_b space_slot_1)
(assign_variety_to_batch greenhouse_facility_b crop_variety_1)
(confirm_variety_for_batch greenhouse_facility_b crop_variety_1)
(attach_permit_to_facility greenhouse_facility_b permit_b)
(load_substrate_into_bay greenhouse_facility_b substrate_mix_b production_bay_a)
(apply_permit_and_advance_compliance_stage greenhouse_facility_b substrate_mix_b production_bay_a crop_variety_1 permit_b)
(provision_nutrient_to_facility greenhouse_facility_b nutrient_solution_batch_1)
(reserve_equipment_for_batch greenhouse_facility_b equipment_1)
(assign_nutrient_and_confirm_facility greenhouse_facility_b nutrient_solution_batch_1 equipment_1 substrate_mix_b production_bay_a)
(provision_climate_buffer_to_facility greenhouse_facility_b climate_buffer_1)
(apply_climate_buffer_and_confirm_profiles greenhouse_facility_b climate_buffer_1 substrate_mix_b production_bay_a)
(assign_labor_shift_to_facility greenhouse_facility_b labor_shift_evening)
(perform_final_quality_validation_for_facility greenhouse_facility_b bench_batch_1 rack_batch_1 crop_variety_1 labor_shift_evening)
(finalize_validation_and_release greenhouse_facility_b)
(assign_contingency_to_batch greenhouse_facility_b contingency_reserve_1 crop_variety_1)
(finalize_facility_allocation_and_return_slot greenhouse_facility_b space_slot_1 contingency_reserve_1)
message.reasoning:
The problem involves allocating resources for greenhouse batches: bench_batch_1, rack_batch_1, and two greenhouse facilities: greenhouse_facility_a and greenhouse_facility_b. The goal is to finalize all of them: (allocation_finalized bench_batch_1), (allocation_finalized rack_batch_1), (allocation_finalized greenhouse_facility_a), (allocation_finalized greenhouse_facility_b).


## Examining resource allocation  
- The task involves allocating resources for greenhouse batches: bench_batch_1, rack_batch_1, and two facilities: greenhouse_facility_a, greenhouse_facility_b.  
- The goal is to ensure all allocations are finalized, as shown by the conditions (allocation_finalized bench_batch_1), (allocation_finalized rack_batch_1), (allocation_finalized greenhouse_facility_a), and (allocation_finalized greenhouse_facility_b).

## Examining resource allocation  
- The task involves four allocations: bench_batch_1, rack_batch_1, greenhouse_facility_a, and greenhouse_facility_b, all subtypes of crop_batch.  
- Each allocation needs a space slot reserved, but finalizing returns the slot, suggesting a sequential process.  

## Analyzing allocation dependencies  
- Finalizing a crop_batch requires registering, reserving a space slot, assigning and confirming a variety, and passing allocation validation.  
- Bench and rack batches have additional preparation steps, while greenhouse facilities involve substrate and permit bindings.  

## Checking available resources  
- Three space slots (1, 2, 3) are available, but four batches need allocation, potentially requiring sequential processing.  
- Bindings like bench_irrigation and rack_lighting are already set, and facilities are assigned to production_bay_a with specific substrate mixes.  

## Exploring seasonal document availability  
- Greenhouse_facility_a is bound to seasonal_document_1, which is available, but greenhouse_facility_b’s binding to seasonal_document_2 needs verification.  
- The initial state confirms seasonal_document_1’s availability, suggesting checking for seasonal_document_2’s status.

## Examining resource constraints  
- Only one contingency_reserve_1 and one crop_variety_1 are available, requiring sequential allocation for the four batches.  
- Shared resources like production_bay_a, equipment_1, and consumable_fertilizer_1 limit simultaneous processing, suggesting a need for a planned sequence.  

## Exploring sequential allocation strategy  
- Starting with bench_batch_1, the plan involves registering, reserving space_slot_1, and assigning crop_variety_1, followed by confirmation.  
- Preparing bench_batch_1 includes using consumable_fertilizer_1 and irrigation_profile_zone_1, with finalization returning resources for the next batch.  

## Addressing variety availability  
- Assigning crop_variety_1 to bench_batch_1 makes it unavailable, potentially blocking rack_batch_1 until variety is freed.  
- A rollback action (rollback_variety_assignment_for_batch) can restore variety availability, enabling sequential processing.  

## Investigating seasonal document issues  
- Greenhouse_facility_b is bound to seasonal_document_2, but only seasonal_document_1 is confirmed available, possibly blocking actions.  
- The action attach_seasonal_document_and_approve_facility requires an available document, suggesting a need to verify or adjust bindings.

## Investigating provision actions  
- Four provision actions exist for production bays, varying by irrigation and lighting states (engaged or prepared) and bench/rack readiness.  
- None require variety_binding for benches or racks; they focus on prepared profiles and equipment states.  

## Examining substrate loading requirements  
- Marking a bay ready for substrate loading requires the bay to be provisioned, bench prepared, and variety_binding for the bench batch.  
- Substrate loading and confirmation actions involve facility bindings, requiring variety_binding at the facility level, not benches.  

## Exploring preparation without finalization  
- Preparing benches and racks sets them to "prepared" states using consumables, but finalization is needed to release resources like fertilizers.  
- Without finalization, consumables remain bound, limiting sequential processing due to shared resource constraints.

## Examining consumable constraints  
- Preparing benches or racks with consumables binds the resource, making it unavailable for subsequent preparations.  
- Without finalizing preparation, consumables remain bound, limiting sequential processing due to shared resource shortages.  

## Investigating alternative preparation paths  
- Using the equipment path for preparation requires engaging profiles, which in turn needs variety_binding, creating a dependency.  
- Preparing one batch with consumables and another with equipment isn't feasible, as consumables are general and consumed by the first use.  

## Exploring facility-specific processing  
- Bay provisioning requires both bench and rack prepared, but facilities share the same bench, rack, and bay, suggesting a single preparation process.  
- Substrate loading varies by facility, but the bay’s single nature means sequential processing is necessary, with variety_binding still required for marking the bay ready.  

## Analyzing validation alternatives  
- Actions like record_validation_and_stage_release and finalize_validation_and_release can set validation_passed for facilities without needing bay substrate steps.  
- Finalizing bench and rack allocations to the bay also sets validation_passed, offering potential bypasses for variety_binding dependencies at earlier stages.

## Continuing facility-specific processing  
- Binding crop variety to the rack enables lighting engagement, preparing the rack for provisioning with equipment.  
- Provisioning the production bay requires prepared bench and rack, with irrigation and lighting engaged, matching current states for sequential processing.  

## Assessing bay readiness for substrate  
- Marking the bay ready for substrate loading needs variety_binding for the bench, but currently, variety is bound to the rack.  
- Rolling back the rack’s variety assignment makes the variety available, allowing it to bind to the bench for bay readiness.  

## Finalizing resource allocation  
- Finalizing bench allocation to the bay requires the bench to be ready for provisioning, but preparation wasn’t finalized, leaving it in an intermediate state.  
- This step sets allocation_validation_passed for the bench, crucial for downstream validation processes.

## Reviewing equipment and contingency assignments  
- Equipment remains bound to the rack after reserve_equipment_for_batch, needing rollback for reassignment.  
- Rolling back variety from bench makes it available, allowing reassignment to rack for contingency binding.  

## Finalizing rack and bench allocations  
- Assigning contingency to rack and finalizing batch returns slots and reserves, completing rack preparation.  
- Both bench and rack are now finalized, with slots and reserves available for further use.  

## Managing greenhouse facility processing  
- Registering greenhouse_facility_a involves reserving slots and confirming variety, setting up for validation.  
- Loading substrate into the bay for gh_a requires allocation confirmation and existing bay readiness, ensuring proper binding.  

## Checking irrigation configuration conflicts  
- Bay irrigation is configured from provisioning, but some actions expect it not configured, creating potential conflicts.  
- Confirming substrate binding to bay requires resolving irrigation status to proceed with facility validation.

## Attaching permits to facilities
- Attaching a permit to greenhouse_facility_a requires it to be confirmed and the permit available, then marks it attached and bound.
- After attachment, the permit is no longer available, setting up for further compliance stages.

## Loading substrates into bays
- Loading substrate_mix_a into production_bay_a for gh_a requires bay readiness and substrate availability, marking it loaded and bound.
- Multiple substrates can be loaded into the same bay for different facilities, as loading status is tracked per substrate.

## Advancing compliance stages
- Applying the permit and advancing compliance for gh_a needs loaded substrate, bound bay, and attached permit, marking substrate assigned.
- This step completes the permit stage, setting facility_substrate_assigned for gh_a, ready for nutrient provisioning.

## Provisioning nutrients
- Provisioning nutrient_solution_batch_1 to gh_a requires confirmation and nutrient availability, binding it and marking it unavailable.
- This prepares for nutrient assignment, ensuring nutrient_binding is established for facility operations.

## Rolling back facility resources  
- After finalizing greenhouse_facility_a, resources like variety and nutrient can be rolled back, making them available for other facilities.  
- Rollback actions include revoking nutrient and climate buffer from facility_a, ensuring resources like nutrient_solution_batch_1 are reusable.  

## Managing greenhouse facility b setup  
- Registering and confirming greenhouse_facility_b involves reserving space slots and assigning crop_variety_1, setting up for further operations.  
- Attaching permit_b and loading substrate_mix_b into production_bay_a requires availability and bay readiness, marking substrate bound and unavailable.  

## Advancing compliance for facility b  
- Applying permit_b and advancing compliance for facility_b needs loaded substrate and configured irrigation, marking substrate assigned.  
- This step prepares facility_b for nutrient provisioning, ensuring permit stage completion.  

## Releasing and provisioning resources for b  
- Releasing equipment and labor from facility_a, such as equipment_1 and labor_shift_evening, makes them available for facility_b.  
- Provisioning nutrient_solution_batch_1 to facility_b requires prior revocation from facility_a, ensuring resource availability.

pddl2nl_prompt.note: autoplanbench_pddl2nl: run_save_descriptions.py --type full — шаблоны/JSON, без вызова LLM на построение промпта для сэмпла.

domain_setup.note: Файл domain_llm_usage_seedN.json не найден для section/subsection этого id (старый autoplanbench или домен не пересобирали). После run_domain_setup с обновлённым autoplanbench файл появится рядом с domain_description_seedN.json.

pipeline_usage.totals_scope_note: Per-run totals = planning + pddl2nl_prompt + nl2pddl (только tracked=true). domain_setup всегда вне totals (included_in_per_run_totals=false); цифры в блоке — для справки, агрегировать отдельно: domain_llm_usage_seed*.json + дедуп в collect_pipeline_token_usage.py.
